name: -Cage-RPG
description:
𝓒𝓪𝓰𝓮 — The Academy, where the strong reign supreme and the weak are left in the dust.

This is no ordinary school — it’s a battleground where reputations are forged in the heat of combat,and the only currency that matters is raw, unbridled power.

At Cage, there is no room for petty arguments or passive-aggressive notes.

When students have a score to settle, they don’t just talk about it, they take it to the Cage!

They fight for glory, for respect, and for the chance to climb the social ladder.

Students of all fighting backgrounds

from ⚡ lightning-fast speed

to 🌋 earth-shattering strength

to 🧠 mind-bending sorcery

They train relentlessly, honing their skills and pushing their bodies to the limit,all for the chance to prove themselves in the Cage.

Will you have what it takes to become the most popular and respected student in the school?Or will you fall prey to the ruthless machinations of your rivals?

The choice is yours… but one thing is certain in this school, there’s no hiding from the spotlight.

-ps this is my first one :)

anyways go crazy
creator: AB273
